<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="docs/src/deployment/console_access.rst" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-rst-code-docs-src-deployment-console-access-bash-174" location="lines:174-177" -->
```bash
    $ apt-get update
    $ apt-get install -y vim
    $ vim console.conf # paste in the config from above
    $ /app/bin/canton -v -c console.conf
```
